values.Description:
CipherChase was an online digital treasure hunt run as an event in two seasons conducted by my team and I. 

Cipherchase revolves around the idea of solving puzzles that bend the standard narrative of treasure hunts. Every challenge requires very deep reasoning and multiple steps of reasoning.

We had over 400+ student participants during the 2nd season and the event itself received very positive feedback.
values.Tagline: An online treasure hunt where you win with logic and mind bending puzzles
values.Title: CipherChase
